title: Workshop
theme: Foundations of Data Science & Applied Analytics
speaker: Mr. Arjun Rao – Data Scientist, Industry Professional
description: This workshop focuses on building strong foundations in Data Science through practical, hands-on sessions. Participants will gain exposure to essential tools, workflows, and problem-solving techniques used in real-world data projects.
flow: Introduction to Data Science and real-world use cases
Data preprocessing and Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
Mini case study and interactive Q&A

title: Hackathon
speaker: Mentors from academia and industry
description: The hackathon encourages innovation, teamwork, and applied problem-solving. Teams will work on real-world problem statements and develop data-driven solutions within a limited time frame, enhancing collaboration and technical skills.

title: Technical Talk & Panel Discussion
theme: Careers, Research & the Future of Data Science
speaker: Industry & Academic Experts
description: The final day includes a technical talk followed by a panel discussion featuring experts from academia and industry. The session focuses on career opportunities, research paths, industry expectations, and the future scope of Data Science.
flow: Technical Talk: Building a Career in Data Science
Panel discussion with industry and academic experts
